papers.title_en: Latent diffusion-augmented cross-modal representation learning for radiology report generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射科报告生成中细微特征语义表达弱的挑战，提出了一种潜在扩散增强的跨模态表征学习框架。该方法利用扩散模型强化图像与文本间的语义关联，从而生成更准确、详尽的诊断描述。实验证明，该方法能显著提升报告质量，减轻医师负担，具有重要的临床应用价值。
papers.abstract_en: Radiology report generation aims to produce comprehensive textual descriptionsfrom medical images, enhancing diagnostic efficiency and alleviating the workload ofradiologists. However, it often suffers from weak semantic expression of subtle …

papers.title_en: Region–patch aware soft-attention network for hepatocellular carcinoma histopathology: context-guided multi-view fusion with deep ROI supervision
papers.tldr: 本研究针对肝细胞癌（HCC）病理全切片图像中分辨率极高、病变形态复杂及局部上下文缺失的挑战，提出了一种区域-补丁感知的软注意力网络。该方法通过上下文引导的多视图融合技术，并结合深度感兴趣区域（ROI）监督，实现了对HCC组织病理学图像的精准分类。研究不仅提升了模型对复杂形态的捕捉能力，还通过多尺度特征融合增强了分类性能，为临床病理诊断提供了高效的自动化工具。
papers.abstract_en: Due to ultra-high resolution, irregular lesion morphology, and limited backgroundinformation in local regions, the accurate classification of hepatocellular carcinomabased on hematoxylin-and-eosin (H&E) whole-slide images remains challenging. To …

papers.title_en: A clinical-radiomics integrated nomogram for predicting 5-year survival in rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease
papers.tldr: 本研究针对类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病（RA-ILD）预后评估难的问题，开发并验证了一种结合临床特征与影像组学的列线图模型。通过分析患者的临床数据和CT影像特征，该模型旨在预测RA-ILD患者的5年生存率。研究结果表明，这种集成模型能有效提升生存预测的准确性，为临床医生制定个性化治疗方案和风险分层提供了有力的决策支持。
papers.abstract_en: Objectives Rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease (RA-ILD)shortens survival and impairs quality of life, with prognosis assessment challenging.This study aimed to predict RA-ILD patients' survival via clinical features and …

papers.title_en: 177Lu-PSMA-617 SPECT/CT for early prediction of overall survival in participants with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了177Lu-PSMA-617 SPECT/CT成像在预测转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）患者总生存期（OS）中的作用。通过分析接受177Lu-PSMA-617联合恩扎卢胺治疗患者的早期影像学表现，研究旨在评估SPECT/CT作为疗效预测生物标志物的潜力。结果表明，早期SPECT/CT参数能有效预测患者的生存预后，为优化mCRPC的个体化治疗方案提供了重要依据。
papers.abstract_en: Background Lutetium 177 (177Lu) prostate-specific membrane antigen (PSMA)–617SPECT/CT has demonstrated promise as a response biomarker for 177Lu-PSMA-617 therapy. Purpose To predict overall survival (OS) after enzalutamide plus 177Lu …

papers.title_en: PD23-02 PROSTATE-SPECIFIC ANTIGEN ENDPOINTS IN THE PHASE 3 PSMADDITION STUDY OF [177LU] LU-PSMA-617 (177LU-PSMA-617) COMBINED WITH …
papers.tldr: 本研究为一项名为PSMAddition的III期临床试验，旨在评估在雄激素剥夺疗法（ADT）和雄激素受体通路抑制剂（ARPI）的基础上，联合使用[177Lu]Lu-PSMA-617治疗转移性激素敏感性前列腺癌（mHSPC）的效果。结果显示，该联合疗法显著改善了前列腺特异性抗原（PSA）相关终点，为mHSPC患者提供了更有效的治疗方案。
papers.abstract_en: INTRODUCTION AND OBJECTIVES: In the phase 3 PSMAddition study(NCT04720157), combining 177Lu-PSMA-617 with androgen deprivation therapy(ADT) and an androgen receptor pathway inhibitor (ARPI) significantly improved …

papers.title_en: IP79-01 PI-RADS–STRATIFIED MRI PSA DENSITY AND ADVERSE PATHOLOGY AFTER RADICAL PROSTATECTOMY IN THE MRI ERA
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了在现代MRI时代，基于PI-RADS评分分层的MRI前列腺特异性抗原密度（PSAD）与根治性前列腺切除术后不良病理结果之间的关系。研究旨在评估PSAD作为风险分层生物标志物的有效性，特别是在不同PI-RADS评分背景下预测手术后病理升级或不良预后的能力，为局限性前列腺癌的临床决策提供重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: INTRODUCTION AND OBJECTIVES: In the modern MRI era, PSA density (PSAD)derived from multiparametric MRI has become an accessible biomarker for riskstratification in localized prostate cancer. Although widely used, the optimal PSAD …

papers.title_en: Enhancing radiology workflows through collaborative AI-assisted chest X-ray reporting using large vision-language models: a proof-of-concept study
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了利用大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）辅助放射科医生编写胸部X光报告的协作模式。通过开发一种能自动生成部分报告内容的AI工具，研究评估了其在提高报告效率和医生满意度方面的潜力。作为一项概念验证研究，它展示了AI协作如何优化放射科工作流，在保证诊断质量的同时减轻医生负担，为未来临床集成提供了参考。
papers.abstract_en: Objectives To evaluate whether collaborative assistance from an artificial intelligence-based tool that proposes partial radiology report content can improve reportingefficiency and radiologist satisfaction in chest X-ray interpretation, without …

papers.title_en: Data-Efficient Language Model for Assessing Pulmonary Embolism Diagnostic Certainty From Radiology Reports: Model Development and Validation Study
papers.tldr: 本研究针对肺栓塞（PE）CTPA 报告中常见的诊断不确定性问题，开发并验证了一种数据高效的语言模型。该模型旨在从模糊的放射学描述中准确提取诊断确定性，解决了医学标注数据获取难的挑战。实验结果表明，该方法在小样本情况下仍能保持高准确度，为临床自动化评估和医疗质量改进提供了有效的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Background Computed tomography pulmonary angiography (CTPA) is the standardimaging modality for diagnosing pulmonary embolism (PE), but diagnosticuncertainty is common due to technical limitations and vague language, leading to …

papers.title_en: Comparison of pre-therapeutic [99mTc] Tc-MAA SPECT/CT and post-therapeutic 90Y-PET/CT dosimetry for outcome prediction in hepatocellular carcinoma treated …
papers.tldr: 本研究回顾性分析了肝细胞癌患者在接受钇-90（90Y）树脂微球治疗前后的剂量学差异。通过对比治疗前[99mTc] Tc-MAA SPECT/CT与治疗后90Y-PET/CT的剂量评估，探讨其与临床预后的相关性，旨在评估治疗前预测剂量在指导治疗和预测疗效方面的准确性与临床价值。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose To compare pre-and post-therapy dosimetry in association with clinicaloutcomes in a large cohort of hepatocellular carcinoma treated with yttrium 90 (90Y)labelled resin-microspheres. Materials and methods This was a retrospective study …

papers.title_en: Artificial intelligence in acute hydrocephalus: Narrowing the diagnostic gap
papers.tldr: 梗阻性脑积水因脑脊液循环受阻导致颅内压升高，具有生命危险。本研究探讨了人工智能在急性脑积水诊断中的应用，旨在通过AI技术缩小诊断差距，提高诊断的及时性和准确性，从而为临床紧急干预提供支持，降低患者风险。
papers.abstract_en: Obstructive hydrocephalus is characterized by an obstruction of cerebrospinal fluid(CSF) flow. This may rapidly lead to a critical elevation of intracranial pressure (ICP)and constitute an acute life-threatening condition. Without timely and adequate …

papers.title_en: Commercial artificial intelligence–assisted performance and interpretation time of first-on-call radiology residents using computed tomography pulmonary angiography …
papers.tldr: 本研究是一项多中心、多阅片者研究，旨在评估商业化人工智能（AI）在辅助一线值班放射科住院医师通过CT肺动脉造影（CTPA）诊断肺栓塞时的表现及判读效率。研究通过对比AI辅助前后的诊断准确率与耗时，探讨了AI在急诊环境下提升初级医师诊断能力的潜力，为临床引入AI辅助决策提供了实证支持。
papers.abstract_en: Commercial artificial intelligence–assisted performance and interpretation time offirst-on-call radiology residents using computed tomography pulmonary angiographyto detect pulmonary embolism: a multireader, multicenter study - Song - Quantitative …

papers.title_en: QPath: A Question-Aware Multi-Resolution Vision Language Framework for Computational Pathology
papers.tldr: 本研究针对计算病理学中视觉问答（VQA）模型仅依赖单分辨率分析的局限性，提出了QPath框架。该框架是一种问题感知的多分辨率视觉语言模型，能够根据问题需求动态整合不同尺度的病理图像特征。通过模拟病理学家从宏观到微观的诊断过程，QPath在病理VQA任务上实现了更精准的分析，为复杂病理图像的自动化理解提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Computational pathology has recently advanced through the use of multimodal largelanguage models (MLLMs) for visual question answering (VQA). However, mostexisting approaches rely on single-resolution analysis of pathology images, limiting …

papers.title_en: SVCF: Enabling Zero-Shot Correction of Reasoning Steps in Multi-Modal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在处理复杂推理任务时容易产生逻辑错误的问题，本文提出了 SVCF 框架。该框架通过零样本学习机制，实现了对模型推理步骤的自动验证与实时纠错。研究贡献在于无需额外微调即可显著提升 MLLM 在多模态场景下的推理准确性和逻辑连贯性，为增强复杂任务下的模型可靠性提供了有效路径。
papers.abstract_en: The latest advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) havedemonstrated remarkable performance in complex reasoning tasks. However, withthe increasing complexity of problems and the diversification of modalities, MLLMs …

papers.title_en: Game-Theoretic Insights into Multi-Agent LLM Debate for Enhanced Clinical Question Answering
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在临床问答中可靠性不足的问题，引入博弈论视角来分析和优化多智能体辩论（MAD）机制。通过让多个LLM智能体相互批判并整合彼此的回答，研究探索了如何通过群体智能提升医学咨询的准确性。该方法不仅为理解智能体间的互动提供了理论框架，还显著增强了模型在复杂医疗场景下的决策质量，为高风险领域的LLM应用提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) have advanced in medical question answering, yetensuring reliability remains challenging. We study multi-agent debate (MAD), wheremultiple LLM agents critique and aggregate each other's answers. Our game …

papers.title_en: GiLT: Augmenting Transformer Language Models with Dependency Graphs
papers.tldr: 本研究提出了GiLT，旨在通过引入依存图（Dependency Graphs）结构来增强Transformer语言模型的句法泛化能力。相比于以往侧重于成分树（Constituency Trees）的研究，GiLT利用依存关系捕捉更丰富的语言结构信息。实验表明，该方法能有效提升模型在处理复杂句法结构时的表现，为结合语言学知识与深度学习模型提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Augmenting Transformers with linguistic structures effectively enhances the syntacticgeneralization performance of language models. Previous work in this directionfocuses on syntactic tree structures of languages, in particular constituency tree …

papers.title_en: LoSA: Locality Aware Sparse Attention for Block-Wise Diffusion Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对块状扩散语言模型（DLM）在长文本场景下受限于内存密集型注意力机制的问题，提出了LoSA（局部感知稀疏注意力）。LoSA利用扩散模型生成过程中的局部性特征，通过优化注意力计算显著降低了内存开销并提升了推理效率，为非自回归生成模型在大规模长文本应用中提供了高效的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Block-wise diffusion language models (DLMs) generate multiple tokens in any order,offering a promising alternative to the autoregressive decoding pipeline. However,they still remain bottlenecked by memory-bound attention in long-context scenarios …

papers.title_en: Effects of Cross-lingual Evidence in Multilingual Medical Question Answering
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了跨语言证据在多语言医疗问答（MMQA）中的作用，涵盖了高资源（如英语、西班牙语）和低资源（如巴斯克语、哈萨克语）语言。通过评估三种不同类型的外部证据来源，研究分析了跨语言信息如何提升不同资源水平语言下的医疗问答模型性能，为优化多语言医疗信息检索提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: This paper investigates Multilingual Medical Question Answering across high-resource (English, Spanish, French, Italian) and low-resource (Basque, Kazakh)languages. We evaluate three types of external evidence sources across models of …

papers.title_en: SSL-R1: Self-Supervised Visual Reinforcement Post-Training for Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在强化学习后训练中过度依赖语言先验和昂贵人工标注奖励的问题，提出了SSL-R1。这是一种自监督视觉强化学习方法，旨在通过自监督机制减少对外部验证信号的依赖，显著提升了模型在多模态任务中的推理能力，为MLLM的高效后训练提供了新路径。
papers.abstract_en: Reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has demonstrated thegreat potential of enhancing the reasoning abilities in multimodal large languagemodels (MLLMs). However, the reliance on language-centric priors and expensive …

papers.title_en: SemiGDA: Generative Dual-distribution Alignment for Semi-Supervised Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 针对医学图像分割中标注成本高、标签稀缺的问题，本文提出了SemiGDA框架。该方法通过生成式双分布对齐策略，充分挖掘无标签数据中的潜在信息。SemiGDA结合了判别式分割与生成式建模，通过在特征和预测层面进行双重分布对齐，显著提升了模型在半监督场景下的泛化能力和分割精度，为低资源医学影像分析提供了有效方案。
papers.abstract_en: Semi-supervised learning addresses label scarcity and high annotation costs inmedical image segmentation by exploiting the latent information in unlabeled data toenhance model performance. Traditional discriminative segmentation relies on …

papers.title_en: CT-FineBench: A Diagnostic Fidelity Benchmark for Fine-Grained Evaluation of CT Report Generation
papers.tldr: 针对CT报告生成中评估文本量大、病灶复杂及细粒度属性缺失等挑战，本文提出了CT-FineBench，这是一个专注于诊断忠实度的细粒度评估基准。该基准通过引入多维度的细粒度属性评估，旨在更准确地衡量生成报告在临床诊断上的可靠性，为医疗AI模型的性能评估提供了更严谨的标准。
papers.abstract_en: The evaluation of generated reports remains a critical challenge in ComputedTomography (CT) report generation, due to the large volume of text, the diversity andcomplexity of findings, and the presence of fine-grained, disease-oriented attributes …

papers.title_en: SycoPhantasy: Quantifying Sycophancy and Hallucination in Small Open Weight VLMs for Vision-Language Scoring of Fantasy Characters
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了小型开源视觉语言模型（VLM）在评估图像与文本对齐时的可靠性，特别是在奇幻角色评分场景下。通过引入SycoPhantasy基准，研究量化了模型在评分过程中表现出的谄媚（顺从用户偏好）和幻觉现象。研究发现，这些模型在面对带有偏见的提示时，往往无法保持客观，容易产生误导性评分。该工作为评估和提升VLM作为自动评价工具的鲁棒性提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed as evaluators in tasksrequiring nuanced image understanding, yet their reliability in scoring alignmentbetween images and text descriptions remains underexplored. We investigate …

papers.title_en: Learning to Route Queries to Heads for Attention-based Re-ranking with Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在零样本重排序中盲目聚合所有注意力头信号导致性能受限的问题，提出了一种查询路由机制。该方法通过学习将特定查询引导至最相关的注意力头，从而更精确地估计文档相关性。实验表明，这种选择性利用注意力信号的策略显著提升了重排序的准确性，为优化LLM在信息检索中的应用提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently been explored as fine-grained zero-shot re-rankers by leveraging attention signals to estimate document relevance.However, existing methods either aggregate attention signals across all heads or …

papers.title_en: ESICA: A Scalable Framework for Text-Guided 3D Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究提出了ESICA，一个可扩展的文本引导3D医学图像分割框架。该框架允许用户通过自然语言直接指定感兴趣区域，克服了传统基于预定义类别或空间提示模型的局限性。ESICA通过引入灵活的文本交互机制，显著提升了模型在处理复杂临床场景下的适应性与可扩展性，为大规模医学影像分析提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Text guided 3D medical image segmentation offers a flexible alternative to classbased and spatial prompt based models by allowing users to specify regions ofinterest directly in natural language. This paradigm avoids reliance on predefined …

papers.title_en: Marco-MoE: Open Multilingual Mixture-of-Expert Language Models with Efficient Upcycling
papers.tldr: Marco-MoE 是一套开源的多语言稀疏专家混合（MoE）模型，旨在通过高效的“上循环”技术提升多语言处理能力。该模型采用极度稀疏的设计，每个 token 仅激活约 5% 的参数，在显著降低推理计算成本的同时保持了强大的语言理解性能，为构建高效开源多语言大模型提供了新路径。
papers.abstract_en: We present Marco-MoE, a suite of fully open multilingual sparse Mixture-of-Experts(MoE) models. Marco-MoE features a highly sparse design in which only around 5\%of the total parameters are activated per input token. This extreme sparsity, combined …
